title: Lodha Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lodha Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!
